chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجُوزُ مِنَ الْوَقْفِ وَ الصَّدَقَةِ وَ النُّحْلِ وَ الْهِبَةِ وَ السُّكْنَى وَ الْعُمْرَى وَ الرُّقْبَى وَ مَا لَا يَجُوزُ مِنْ ذَلِكَ عَلَى الْوَلَدِ وَ غَيْرِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 23 – What is allowed from the endowment, and the charity, and the grant, and the gift, and the (provision) of habitation, and the lifetime (service) and the bondman, and what is allowed from that upon the child and others

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/63)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/63)
text: كَتَبَ بَعْضُ أَصْحَابِنَا إِلَى أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام ) فِي الْوَقْفِ وَ مَا رُوِيَ فِيهَا فَوَقَّعَ ( عليه السلام ) الْوُقُوفُ عَلَى حَسَبِ مَا يَقِفُهَا أَهْلُهَا إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ .

en.hubeali: ‘Some of our companions wrote to Abu Muhammad<sup>asws</sup> regarding the dedication and what is reported with regards to it. (He<sup>asws</sup>) said: ‘The dedication depends upon the what (stipulation) its owner has dedicated with, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Willing’.
en.sarwar: 34. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated the following: “Certain persons of our people had written to abu Muhammad, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about endowment and what is narrated about it. He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, signed the answer that said, ‘An endowment is according to what people making the endowment do (condition they set), by the will of Allah.”’
